summary: Iteration 119 - Full testing of new features: Fake testimonials removed, Live Chat Widget, Blog with 3 seeded posts, Organic Reviews system, Watermark API. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

backend.notes: Returns empty array (no fake reviews) with totalCount=0, avgRating=0
Returns empty array for public endpoint
Returns 3 seeded posts with correct structure
Category filter works - Instagram Tips, YouTube Tips, Content Strategy
Returns single post with full content, 404 for non-existent

frontend.notes: Shows 'Be the First to Share Your Story' CTA when no approved reviews exist (no fake testimonials)
Visible on all pages - bottom right corner with green pulse indicator
Opens when clicked, shows quick questions, bot responds to questions
5 quick questions available: How to get started, What are credits, Generate reels, Pricing plans, Contact support
Loads with 3 seeded posts, search input, category sidebar
Filters posts by category - Instagram Tips (1), YouTube Tips (1), Content Strategy (1)
Shows 'Be the First to Share Your Experience!' message with 0.0 rating and 0 reviews
Button visible in header, opens feedback form modal
Footer contains Blog link pointing to /blog

critical_code_review_comments: All fake testimonials have been successfully removed from the landing page
Testimonials component correctly fetches from /api/reviews/approved and shows CTA when empty
Live Chat Widget provides helpful quick answers without requiring external service
Blog has proper SEO structure with categories, tags, meta titles/descriptions
Reviews system requires authentication to submit reviews (anti-spam protection)
seed_data_creation: Blog posts were seeded via /api/blog/admin/seed - 3 posts created: Instagram Reels guide, YouTube Kids Story guide, Content Calendar guide
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 119 features all working: 1) No fake testimonials - landing page shows 'Be the First to Share Your Story' CTA, 2) Live Chat Widget visible on all pages with 5 quick questions and auto-responses, 3) Blog page has 3 seeded posts with category filters, 4) Reviews page shows empty state with 0.0 rating and 'Be the First to Share Your Experience' message, 5) Footer has Blog link. All APIs protected appropriately - reviews/submit requires auth, watermark requires auth, blog admin requires admin role.
